name: spawn_agent
desc: Register a sub-agent session for parallel read-only context work.

parameters.name: task
parameters.description: Short description of what this agent should investigate (read-only).

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: Prompt mode for the agent: Build, Designer, QA, or Query (default Build).

parameters.name: parent_session_id
parameters.description: Optional parent chat/session id for grouping in the UI.
